overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a circular gothic council chamber from a fantasy video game, featuring blue stone walls, ornate stained glass windows, and robed figures seated around a curved wooden table. The scene maintains a steady viewpoint throughout with subtle background activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic circular council chamber with curved meeting table

events.description: a robed figure walks across the background from right to left behind the seated council members

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the council chamber from a fixed vantage point overlooking the curved table

notable_agents.action: robed council member seated at the curved wooden table facing inward
robed council member seated at the table reading documents

entered.detail: large curved mahogany table with ornate carvings and glowing blue inlay forming a semicircle
tall gothic arched windows with intricate blue and gold stained glass patterns
ornate vaulted ceiling with gold filigree details and structural ribbing
elaborate hanging light fixture with multiple candles and golden chains
tall dark wood bookcase filled with leather-bound tomes against the blue wall
large vertical wall hanging with decorative border in a gold frame

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of an ornate gothic council chamber with deep blue walls and towering stained glass windows. Several robed figures sit attentively around a massive curved wooden table with glowing blue accents, while bookshelves and tapestries adorn the walls. At approximately the 20-second mark, a background figure walks behind the seated council members, adding subtle motion to the otherwise static scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze upon a gothic council chamber that remains poised in a state of solemn stillness. It begins with a wide view of the ornate room, where deep blue walls and towering stained glass windows frame several robed figures seated around a massive curved wooden table with glowing blue accents. The camera lingers on the surrounding bookshelves and tapestries, establishing a mood of quiet authority. The scene then shifts slightly in energy as a background figure walks behind the seated council members, introducing a subtle layer of motion into the otherwise static environment.
